description: For generating blog posts, articles, and thought leadership content — SEO-friendly, engaging, and on-brand.
toneDescription: Engaging and conversational, but authoritative. Hook the reader, deliver value, end with a clear takeaway.

clarifyingQuestions.question: What is the specific topic or angle for this blog post?
Who is the target reader? (e.g. CTOs, marketing managers, startup founders)
What tone would you prefer? (e.g. professional, casual, provocative)
